title: Verilator generates errors for unreachable generate/if/endgenerate code

features.name: generate if with constant false condition
features.description: Code should include a generate block with an if statement whose condition is a constant expression evaluating to false

features.name: module instantiation with pins in unreachable generate block
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation with pin connections inside a generate block that is unreachable due to constant-false condition
